notes: Keys can be Printify product IDs (recommended) or exact current product titles.
For each product, provide the new premium title and full description.
Description template hints: Style + Fit + Color + Scene + Frictionless closing CTA.

descriptionTemplate.style: Streetwear vibe and core aesthetic in 1-2 lines.
descriptionTemplate.scene: Where/when to wear it (day-night, city, gym, travel).
descriptionTemplate.closing: Low-friction close with confidence and urgency.
descriptionTemplate.example: Built for clean daily rotation. Relaxed fit with premium comfort. Designed in jet black to pair with cargos, denim, or shorts. From coffee runs to late-night city moves. Add to cart now and lock your size before it sells out.
